title: pyrrocoma hirta
intro: Pyrrocoma hirta, also known as woolly rosy mariposa or woolly mariposa, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat skin conditions and wounds. Pyrrocoma hirta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
